race.comment: PALMANOVA (13) resumes for her second campaign. Kept safe in betting on debut when she dropped out sharply for a poor eighth over 1100m at Rosehill last November. Looks to have strengthened over the break judging by the two sound trials. Maps well and will take catching over this trip. SUMERIA (7) is an expensive daughter of Zoustar from the Listed winner The Actuary on debut for the Maher stable. Looked to be under a good hold when third in her latest trial over 818m at this track. Well drawn and has genuine winning claims. LA BARRITA (4) Tony & Calvin McEvoy trained two-year-old filly by St Mark's Basilica from Cabarita on debut. Impressed in her trials in Victoria and can overcome the sticky gate. Blinkers go on and can play a leading role. UNCERTAIN GLORY (10) is a well-bred Zoustar filly from Positive Problems on debut for the Michael Freedman yard. Recent trial winner over 900m at Rosehill and stays in the mix. The chances don't end there.
